<script>
  window.currencyConfig = {
    symbol: "₹",
    position: "left"
  };

//   function formatCurrency(amount) {
//     const symbol = window.currencyConfig?.symbol || '₹';
//     const position = window.currencyConfig?.position || 'left';
//     amount = parseInt(amount);

//     return position === 'right'
//         ? `${amount} ${symbol}`
//         : `${symbol} ${amount}`;
// }

    function formatCurrency(amount) {
        const symbol = window.currencyConfig?.symbol || '₹';
        const position = window.currencyConfig?.position || 'left';

        amount = Number(amount);

        let formatted;

        if (amount % 1 === 0) {
            // No decimal
            formatted = amount.toLocaleString();
        } else {
            // Has decimal → ALWAYS 2 digits
            formatted = amount.toLocaleString(undefined, {
                minimumFractionDigits: 2,
                maximumFractionDigits: 2
            });
        }

        return position === 'right'
            ? `${formatted} ${symbol}`
            : `${symbol} ${formatted}`;
    }
</script>

    function isWithinTimeRange() {
        let checkStartTime = "07:35:00"; // Format: HH:mm:ss
        let checkEndTime = "22:30:00";     // Format: HH:mm:ss

        // Check if the values are null or empty
        if (!checkStartTime || !checkEndTime) {
            return true; // Allow checkout by default if no times are set
        }

        // Get current time
        let currentTime = new Date();
        let currentHours = currentTime.getHours();
        let currentMinutes = currentTime.getMinutes();

        // Convert all time strings to total minutes
        let [startHours, startMinutes] = checkStartTime.split(":").map(Number);
        let [endHours, endMinutes] = checkEndTime.split(":").map(Number);

        let startTotalMinutes = startHours * 60 + startMinutes;
        let endTotalMinutes = endHours * 60 + endMinutes;
        let currentTotalMinutes = currentHours * 60 + currentMinutes;

        // Handle time range that crosses midnight
        if (startTotalMinutes < endTotalMinutes) {
            // Normal same-day range
            if (currentTotalMinutes >= startTotalMinutes && currentTotalMinutes <= endTotalMinutes) {
                return true; // Within time range
            }
        } else {
            // Crosses midnight: allow if after start OR before end
            if (currentTotalMinutes >= startTotalMinutes || currentTotalMinutes <= endTotalMinutes) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        console.log("Order cannot be placed outside working hours.");
        return false; // Outside the allowed time
    }

<script>
    function fetchAddressWithPermission() {
        const loader = document.querySelector('.spinner-loader');
        const locationIcon = document.querySelector('.location-fetch');
        const addressInput = document.getElementById('customerAddress');
        const latInput = document.getElementById('latitude');
        const lngInput = document.getElementById('longitude');
    
        // UI updates
        loader.classList.remove('d-none');
        locationIcon.classList.add('d-none');
        $(".location-fetch").addClass('d-none');
        addressInput.value = "";
    
        if (!navigator.geolocation) {
            showLocationError("Geolocation is not supported by your browser.");
            resetUI();
            return;
        }
    
        navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
            function (position) {
                const lat = position.coords.latitude;
                const lng = position.coords.longitude;
    
                latInput.value = lat;
                lngInput.value = lng;
    
                // Use Google Maps Geocoding API to get human-readable address
                fetch(`https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=json&lat=${lat}&lon=${lng}`)
                    .then(response => response.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        resetLoader();
                        // console.log(data);
                        const address = data.display_name || "Address not found";
                        addressInput.value = address;
                        
                    })
                    .catch(error => {
                        console.error("Error fetching address:", error);
                        addressInput.value = "Error fetching address";
                        resetUI();
                    });
            },

<script>

   function flyToCartAnimation(imageSelector, cartSelector) {
        const productImage = document.querySelector(imageSelector);
        const cartIcon = document.querySelector(cartSelector);

        if (!productImage || !cartIcon) return;

        // Ensure image is loaded
        if (!productImage.complete || productImage.naturalWidth === 0) {
            productImage.onload = () => flyToCartAnimation(imageSelector, cartSelector);
            return;
        }

        // Get image & cart position relative to viewport
        const startRect = productImage.getBoundingClientRect();
        const endRect = cartIcon.getBoundingClientRect();
        const scrollY = window.scrollY || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
        const scrollX = window.scrollX || document.documentElement.scrollLeft;

        const startTop = startRect.top + scrollY;
        const startLeft = startRect.left + scrollX;
        const endTop = endRect.top + scrollY;
        const endLeft = endRect.left + scrollX;

        // Clone image
        const flyingImage = productImage.cloneNode(true);
        document.body.appendChild(flyingImage);

        Object.assign(flyingImage.style, {
            position: 'absolute',
            top: `${startTop}px`,
            left: `${startLeft}px`,
            width: `${startRect.width}px`,
            height: `${startRect.height}px`,
            borderRadius: '8px',
            zIndex: '9999',
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            transition: 'transform 0.8s ease, opacity 0.8s ease',
        });

        // Force reflow
        flyingImage.offsetWidth;

        // Animate using transform
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            const dx = endLeft - startLeft;
            const dy = endTop - startTop;
            flyingImage.style.transform = `translate(${dx}px, ${dy}px) scale(0.1)`;
            flyingImage.style.opacity = '0.2';
        });

        // Cleanup and bounce
        setTimeout(() => {
            flyingImage.remove();
            cartIcon.classList.add("cart-bounce");
            setTimeout(() => cartIcon.classList.remove("cart-bounce"), 500);
            $('#productModal').modal('hide');
        }, 850);
    }

</script>
    
<script>
    let selectedAddons = {}; // Store selected addon IDs and quantities
    
   function getAddons(item_id) {
        
        selectedAddons = {};

        $.ajax({
            url: `https://scanmenu.in/restaurant/api/product-addons/${item_id}`,
            type: 'GET',
            success: function (response) {
                let variantsHtml = '';
                const $addonWrapper = $('#productAddonsWrapper'); // wrap container

                if (response.length > 0) {
                    $addonWrapper.show();
                    response.forEach((variant) => {
                    variantsHtml += `
                        <button class="btn btn-outline-primary addon-option text-start" 
                                style="width: auto; display: inline-block;"
                                data-id="${variant.id}" 
                                data-item-id="${variant.item_id}" 
                                data-price="${variant.price}">
                            ${variant.name} - ${formatCurrency(variant.price)}
                        </button>
                        `;

                    });
                } else {
                    $addonWrapper.hide(); // hide the whole section if no addons
                }

                $('#productAddons').html(variantsHtml);
            },
            error: function (xhr, error, status) {
                console.log('Addon load error:', xhr);
            }
        });
    }

    // Handle addon selection
    $(document).on('click', '.addon-option', function () {
        const addonBtn = $(this);
        const addonId = addonBtn.data('id');
        const price = parseFloat(addonBtn.data('price'));

        // If already selected, do nothing (handled by + / - buttons)
        if (selectedAddons[addonId]) return;

        selectedAddons[addonId] = 1;

        addonBtn.replaceWith(`
            <div class="addon-qty-box border btn-primary active d-flex align-items-center px-3 py-1 gap-2 mb-2" 
                data-id="${addonId}" data-price="${price}">
                <span class="flex-grow-1 small fw-semibold">${addonBtn.text()}</span>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary addon-minus py-0 px-2">−</button>
                <span class="addon-qty small">1</span>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary addon-plus py-0 px-2">+</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary addon-remove py-0 px-2">×</button>
            </div>
        `);

        updateTotalPrice();
    });

    // Increment addon quantity
    $(document).on('click', '.addon-plus', function () {
        const box = $(this).closest('.addon-qty-box');
        const id = box.data('id');
        selectedAddons[id]++;
        box.find('.addon-qty').text(selectedAddons[id]);
        updateTotalPrice();
    });

    // Decrement addon quantity
    $(document).on('click', '.addon-minus', function () {
        const box = $(this).closest('.addon-qty-box');
        const id = box.data('id');
        if (selectedAddons[id] > 1) {
            selectedAddons[id]--;
            box.find('.addon-qty').text(selectedAddons[id]);
            updateTotalPrice();
        }
    });

    // Remove addon completely
    $(document).on('click', '.addon-remove', function () {
        const box = $(this).closest('.addon-qty-box');
        const id = box.data('id');
        delete selectedAddons[id];

        // Re-render original button
        const nameText = box.find('span').first().text();
        $('#productAddons').append(`
            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary addon-option" 
                    data-id="${id}" 
                    data-price="${box.data('price')}">
                ${nameText}
            </button>
        `);

        box.remove();
        updateTotalPrice();
    });

    // Update price based on variant + quantity + addons
    function updateTotalPrice() {
        const variantPrice = parseFloat($('.variant-option.btn-primary').data('price')) || 0;
        const baseQty = parseInt($('#productQuantity').val()) || 1;

        let addonTotal = 0;
        Object.keys(selectedAddons).forEach(id => {
            const addonQty = selectedAddons[id];
            const addonPrice = parseFloat($(`.addon-qty-box[data-id='${id}']`).data('price')) || 0;
            addonTotal += addonQty * addonPrice;
        });

        const finalTotal = (variantPrice * baseQty) + addonTotal;
        $('#productPrice').text(formatCurrency(finalTotal.toFixed(0)));
        $('#addToCartButton').text('Add to Cart - ' + formatCurrency(finalTotal.toFixed(0)));
    }

</script>
